channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Study finds surprising link between vitamin C and brain health
item.description: A study of over 2,000 older adults in Japan suggests vitamin C may support healthier aging brains.

item.title: Modern neuroscience revisits a 130-year-old idea from Freud
item.description: A new paper argues that today's leading theory of the brain echoes an idea Sigmund Freud proposed over a century ago.

item.title: Simple water trick reduces diesel engine pollution by over 60%
item.description: A straightforward fuel modification could address a major diesel engine issue: pollution. A review of studies from around...

item.title: Surprising brain discovery challenges views on movement disorders
item.description: A new finding overturns a long-held belief about the brain's movement center. Researchers found that two key cerebellar ce...
